commits.message:
feat(gallery): add new image gallery page

Implemented a responsive image gallery with lazy loading and lightbox support.

fix(ui): resolve dark mode flickering issue

Fixed the flash of unstyled content when toggling between light and dark modes.

refactor(components): extract reusable card component

Created a unified Card component used across articles, projects, and timeline pages.

perf(images): implement next-gen image formats

Added WebP and AVIF support with fallback for older browsers.

feat(seo): add structured data and sitemap

Implemented JSON-LD structured data for better search engine optimization.

style(css): migrate to Tailwind CSS v4

Upgraded Tailwind CSS to version 4 with new configuration and utilities.

docs(readme): update project documentation

Added detailed setup instructions and contribution guidelines.

feat(timeline): redesign timeline page

Complete overhaul of the timeline page with Framer Motion animations.

fix(nav): resolve mobile navigation overlay issue

Fixed z-index problems causing mobile menu to appear behind content.

feat(friends): add friend links page with bottle design

Created a unique drifting bottle style friend links page.

chore(deps): update dependencies to latest versions

Updated Next.js, React, and other core dependencies.

feat(about): redesign about page with skills showcase

Added animated skill bars and project highlights to the about page.

perf(lcp): optimize largest contentful paint

Improved LCP by optimizing hero image loading and font display.

feat(articles): add article series support

Implemented article grouping by series with navigation sidebar.

fix(search): resolve search indexing delay

Fixed issue where new articles were not immediately searchable.

style(typography): improve reading experience

Adjusted font sizes, line heights, and paragraph spacing for better readability.

feat(analytics): add privacy-friendly analytics

Integrated Plausible Analytics without cookies or personal data collection.

refactor(api): unify error handling pattern

Standardized API error responses across all endpoints.

feat(comments): add Giscus comment system

Integrated Giscus for GitHub Discussions-based comments.

chore(ci): setup GitHub Actions for automated testing

Added CI pipeline for linting, type checking, and build verification.
